SOURCE: 15791766.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (15791766.pdf)
SUMMARY: Technical Support Professional skilled at resolving complex customer service issues in a timely manner. Enjoys troubleshooting to find solutions to technical issues. Successful at driving financial and productivity results in fast-paced environments.
SKILLS: A+, Active Directory, agile, Avaya, call center, communication, CA, hardware, contracts, critical thinking, customer service, decision-making, documentation, functional, help-desk, HP printers, IP, laptop computers, Laptops, Microsoft Certified Professional, MCSE, office, MS Outlook, Windows, Windows OS, negotiating, Enterprise, Network, networks, PBX, PC Hardware, telephone systems, Copiers, Printers, problem solving skills, quality control, risk analysis, Routers, scheduling, servers, SMS, Switches, TCP/IP, tech support, phones, troubleshooting, Upgrades, VOIP, VPN, Xerox copiers

SOURCE: 15791766.pdf
JOB TITLE: Project Manager
COMPANY: Company Name 1
DATES: 07/2013 - Current
DESCRIPTION: ['Built and maintained successful relationships with service providers, dealers, and consumers.', 'Provided base-level IT support to company personnel.', 'Defined project deliverables and monitored task status.', 'Delivered status reports for budgeting and planning purposes.', 'Collaborated with cross-functional teams to draft project schedules and plans.', 'Monitored costs, timescales, and resources used to achieve goals.', 'Monitored team progress and enforced deadlines.', 'Partnered with departments to address issues.', 'Planned, implemented, and managed all project contracts, performed scheduling, risk analysis, quality control, and trained staff.']

SOURCE: 15791766.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Technology Specialist
COMPANY: Company Name 2
DATES: 03/2004 - 07/2013
DESCRIPTION: ['Trained new employees and explained protocols clearly.', 'Researched issues on various computer systems and databases to resolve complaints and answer inquiries.', 'Analyzed system problems, performed troubleshooting, ensured connectivity, and trained staff.', 'Managed and supported workstations on TCP/IP, VPN, and WiFi networks.', 'Managed Active Directory, SCCM, VOIP, Avaya PBX systems.', 'Supported the integration of new technologies such as Cloud printing and CSO into operation.', 'Performed weekly health checks via SMS for problem resolutions.', 'Performed routine maintenance on workstations, IP phones, Xerox copiers, HP printers, and laptop computers.', 'Performed all hardware/software upgrades for servers, workstations, copiers, and printers.', 'Acted as a liaison to resolve technical issues for vendors, managers, trainers, etc.', 'Developed and maintained documentation needed by support staff including troubleshooting steps, installation instructions, new tools overviews, and contact lists.', 'Notified users of network/system issues.', 'Established solid work relationships with management, technical staff, vendors, end users.']

SOURCE: 15791766.pdf
DEGREE: Master of Science: Management, Project Management
INSTITUTION: Colorado Technical University
DATES: 06/2012

SOURCE: 15791766.pdf
DEGREE: Bachelor of Science: Information Technology
INSTITUTION: University of Phoenix
DATES: 10/2009
